steps.title: Add the polynomials
steps.content:
Combine the two polynomials by grouping like terms:
$$(3r^4 - 2r) + (3r^4 + 6r + 5)$$
$$= (3r^4 + 3r^4) + (-2r + 6r) + 5$$
$$= 6r^4 + 4r + 5$$

steps.title: Identify the coefficient b
steps.content: The sum is in the form $ar^4 + br + c$ where $a = 6$, $b = 4$, and $c = 5$. Therefore, $b = 4$.
